title: Horror Craft
description: A Simple Yet Terrifying Modpack where you are hunted Bu Creatures Of The night!
body:
### This Modpack Will Not Be receiving Any New Updates

## What Is HC?

HC (Horror Craft) Is A Small Modpack That Allows You To Turn Minecraft Into A Terrifying game..



Checkout other modpacks: [Boxed MC](https://sites.google.com/view/boxedmc/)


~~This Modpack Is **NOT** Finished!~~
